creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
The following error can be found if build with PD.

===========================================================================
====>> Checking for filesystem violations... done
====>> Error: Filesystem touched during build:
root/.rnd extra
===>  Cleaning for nrpe-2.15_3
build of /usr/ports/net-mgmt/nrpe ended at Sun Jun  8 13:21:13 CEST 2014
build time: 00:00:11
!!! build failure encountered !!!

Using env HOME=... in the configure file will change the place and let the port build again.
